AssertionError: Not all images in links have changed sizes

 +    where ('https://www.brainup.site/logos/logo_ARASAAC_black.png', 'https://www.brainup.site/logos/epam.png', 'https://www.brainup.site/logos/jetbrains-variant-4_.png', 'https://www.brainup.site/logos/reg-ru.svg', 'https://www.brainup.site/logos/selectel.png') = fPD.images_src
